name: Lemon Cake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks and sugar until thick.
2. Add in the butter, lemon juice, and lemon rind. Beat well.
3. Incorporate the flour into the mixture. Gradually add milk and mix thoroughly.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
6. Pour the batter into the uncooked pie shell.
7. Bake at 350°F for 55-60 minutes, or until the pie is set and browned on top.
8. Allow the pie to cool completely before cutting.
